home.title: CCM Network Investor Portal
home.subtitle: SAFT investor portal on Base mainnet. Connect your wallet to view your vesting schedule, claim vested tokens, and (if Phase 1 requires) migrate v1 → v2 after audit.

vesting.title: Your vesting schedules
vesting.subtitle: SAFT allocations are locked in CCMVesting until the cliff date, then release linearly over the vesting period. Use Release to claim the currently-vested portion.
vesting.noSchedules: No vesting schedules found for this address.
vesting.released: Release confirmed. Tokens are in your wallet.

settings.title: Settings

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign a message with your wallet to view and manage your portal preferences.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Get notified when your CCM cliff ends or new tokens are claimable.

settings.verifyError: Verification link is invalid or expired.

migrate.title: Migrate v1 → v2
migrate.description: Available only if Phase 0.5 audit identifies a critical fix and a v2 token contract is deployed. Burns your v1 CCM and mints the same amount of v2 CCM 1:1 (or with a documented bonus). The portal disables this page automatically when migration is closed.
